source_rationale: Maintain role registry role-to-skill crosswalk and execution bindings
Classify development framework template target and derivative layers before work
Maintain trace from discovery through validation and maintenance
Create validate supersede and apply Director Decision Records
Convert requirements into V and V plans matrices and evidence obligations
Audit canonical sources derivatives stale docs and authority inversions
Generalize context checkpoint and resumable handoff behavior
Identify permissions autonomy tool data risks and controls
Design eval scenarios rubrics regression checks and failure probes
Manage baselines supersession migrations rollback and change evidence
Convert implementation plans into bounded AgentJobs and task packets
Define monitoring incidents updates evaluation cadence and maintenance
Maintain controlled vocabulary ontology and term decisions
Detect when project-specific domain packs are needed and route accordingly
Govern RDR creation and discovery-to-USRD transition
Identify external systems interfaces data flows owners and integration risks
Build claims evidence and argument structure for high impact systems
